field_values.action_summary: Fleeing the cave into the Arizona night, the protagonist gazes at Mars. He feels an irresistible magnetic pull toward the red planet and is suddenly whisked away through space into darkness.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide vistas of the desert under starlight; Extreme Long Shots (Protagonist vs. Mars in sky); VFX-heavy transition (The pull and jump into darkness)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Fixed celestial position of Mars relative to horizon/protagonist
Visual texture and particle behavior of the transportation effect
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from a terrestrial survival context to a cosmic inciting incident through a sudden, high-impact VFX transportation event. The sequence must bridge the physical reality of the Arizona desert with the metaphysical pull of Mars.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (naked, physically fit)

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_nightscape
- deep_space_void

## Continuity Constraints
- Fixed celestial position of Mars relative to horizon/protagonist
- Visual texture and particle behavior of the transportation effect

## Beat List
- BT001: Fleeing the cave into the night
- BT002: Gazing at Mars and feeling the pull
- BT003: Sudden transportation into the void
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
